title: Textile Waste Risk Assessment
description: Industrial-grade tool to quantify and mitigate waste risk in textile manufacturing, based on ISO 14001, Lean Six Sigma, and WERC standards.

inputs.label: Monthly Production Volume (meters)
inputs.businessContext: Total fabric produced per month, used as baseline for waste ratio calculations.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total fabric produced per month, used as baseline for waste ratio calculations.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Aylık üretilen toplam kumaş, atık oranı hesaplamaları için temel oluşturur.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte monatlich produzierte Stoffmenge, dient als Basis für Abfallverhältnisberechnungen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Tissu total produit par mois, utilisé comme base pour les calculs de taux de rebut.

inputs.label: Fabric Type
inputs.businessContext: Different fabric types have distinct waste generation profiles and recycling potential.

businessContext_i18n.en: Different fabric types have distinct waste generation profiles and recycling potential.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Farklı kumaş türleri, farklı atık oluşum profillerine ve geri dönüşüm potansiyeline sahiptir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Verschiedene Stoffarten haben unterschiedliche Abfallprofile und Recyclingpotenziale.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Différents types de tissus ont des profils de génération de rebut et un potentiel de recyclage distincts.

inputs.label: Current Waste Percentage (%)
inputs.businessContext: Measured waste as a percentage of total production, including cutting, sewing, and finishing losses.

businessContext_i18n.en: Measured waste as a percentage of total production, including cutting, sewing, and finishing losses.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kesim, dikim ve bitirme kayıpları dahil olmak üzere toplam üretimin yüzdesi olarak ölçülen atık.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gemessener Abfall als Prozentsatz der Gesamtproduktion, einschließlich Zuschnitt-, Näh- und Endbearbeitungsverlusten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rebut mesuré en pourcentage de la production totale, incluant les pertes de coupe, couture et finition.

inputs.label: Rework Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of products requiring rework, a key Lean Six Sigma metric for process efficiency.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of products requiring rework, a key Lean Six Sigma metric for process efficiency.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yeniden işleme gerektiren ürünlerin yüzdesi, proses verimliliği için temel bir Yalın Altı Sigma metriğidir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der Produkte, die Nacharbeit erfordern, eine wichtige Lean-Six-Sigma-Kennzahl für Prozesseffizienz.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de produits nécessitant une reprise, un indicateur clé Six Sigma pour l'efficacité des processus.

inputs.label: Defect Density (defects per 1000 meters)
inputs.businessContext: Number of defects per 1000 meters of fabric, critical for quality control.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of defects per 1000 meters of fabric, critical for quality control.
businessContext_i18n.tr: 1000 metre kumaş başına düşen kusur sayısı, kalite kontrol için kritiktir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Fehler pro 1000 Meter Stoff, entscheidend für die Qualitätskontrolle.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de défauts par 1000 mètres de tissu, critique pour le contrôle qualité.

inputs.label: Energy Cost ($/kWh)
inputs.businessContext: Average electricity cost, used to calculate energy waste from inefficient processes.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average electricity cost, used to calculate energy waste from inefficient processes.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ortalama elektrik maliyeti, verimsiz proseslerden kaynaklanan enerji atığını hesaplamak için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Stromkosten, verwendet zur Berechnung von Energieverschwendung durch ineffiziente Prozesse.

inputs.label: Labor Cost ($/hour)
inputs.businessContext: Average hourly wage, used to quantify labor waste from rework and idle time.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average hourly wage, used to quantify labor waste from rework and idle time.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ortalama saatlik ücret, yeniden işleme ve boşta geçen süreden kaynaklanan işgücü atığını ölçmek için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittlicher Stundenlohn, verwendet zur Quantifizierung von Arbeitsverschwendung durch Nacharbeit und Leerlaufzeiten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Salaire horaire moyen, utilisé pour quantifier le gaspillage de main-d'œuvre dû aux reprises et aux temps morts.

inputs.label: Recycling Capability
inputs.businessContext: Current ability to recycle waste fabric, affecting waste disposal cost and environmental impact.

businessContext_i18n.en: Current ability to recycle waste fabric, affecting waste disposal cost and environmental impact.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Atık kumaşı geri dönüştürme konusundaki mevcut yetenek; atık bertaraf maliyetini ve çevresel etkiyi etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Aktuelle Fähigkeit, Abfallstoffe zu recyceln, beeinflusst Abfallentsorgungskosten und Umweltauswirkungen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Capacité actuelle à recycler les déchets textiles, affectant le coût d'élimination des déchets et l'impact environnemental.

rules.message: Waste percentage should not be lower than rework rate; check data consistency.
Defect density for denim is unusually high; verify measurement method.
High recycling capability without ISO 14001 certification may indicate unverified processes.

thresholds.message: Waste percentage exceeds 10% – immediate action required.
Rework rate above 5% – investigate root causes.
Defect density exceeds 20 per 1000m – quality control review needed.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
